title: Debugging Domain Cluster (3 agents, 25-30% overlap)
why_it_matters: Three agents targeting overlapping debugging/RCA problem space. Boundaries scope-based but unclear to users.
suggested_fix: Create decision matrix in CLAUDE.md: debugger=code-level, error-detective=log patterns, devops-troubleshooter=production incidents.

title: Security Domain Cluster (3 agents, 20-25% overlap)
why_it_matters: All three perform vulnerability assessment with blurry boundaries.
suggested_fix: Clarify: auditor=code review, engineer=infrastructure, pen-tester=attack simulation. Add trigger conditions to CLAUDE.md.

title: Documentation Domain Cluster (3 agents, 20-25% overlap)
why_it_matters: All write documentation with unclear when-to-use-which guidance.
suggested_fix: technical-writer=user guides, documentation-expert=system/API docs, markdown-syntax-formatter=format fixes only.

title: Frontend Domain Cluster (3 agents, 15-20% overlap)
why_it_matters: Clear role separation but shared domain. Low confusion risk.
suggested_fix: Document: frontend-developer=implementation, react-performance-optimization=perf issues, ui-ux-designer=design decisions.

title: Backend Architecture Cluster (3 agents, 15% overlap)
why_it_matters: backend-architect and fullstack-developer both cover API design. database-architect is specialized but overlaps.
suggested_fix: backend-architect=API design, database-architect=data modeling, fullstack-developer=cross-layer integration.

suggested_fix: Clarify code-reviewer as primary gate; specialists for deep dives.

title: All 27 records have null agent_name — data corruption
why_it_matters: Cannot verify actual agent usage patterns. Blocks true orphan detection.
suggested_fix: Repair schema or regenerate from audit logs.

title: CLAUDE.md references built-in agents without .md definitions
why_it_matters: CLAUDE.md triggers reference Explore and Plan but these are built-in, not custom agents. No confusion but worth documenting.
suggested_fix: Add note to CLAUDE.md that Explore/Plan are built-in agents, not in .claude/agents/.
